description:
How much water did you really drink today? AquaFaste answers that question — with a personal Hydration Score that rates your day from 0 to 100.

Track every sip with one tap. AquaFaste calculates your daily goal based on your weight and activity level using EFSA guidelines, then helps you hit it every single day.

▸ PERSONAL HYDRATION SCORE

Your Hydration Score rates your daily performance from 0 to 100 — based on consistency, timing, and goal completion. No other app does this. Track your score over time and watch it climb.

▸ ONE-TAP TRACKING

• 12 drink types — water, coffee, tea, juice, milk, smoothie, and more
• Personal daily goal — calculated from your weight and activity level
• Live progress ring — beautiful animated ring fills as you drink
• Caffeine monitoring — track your caffeine intake alongside hydration
• HealthKit sync — your water data flows into Apple Health automatically

▸ INSIGHTS & HISTORY

• Weekly & monthly charts — see hydration trends at a glance
• Daily timeline — every drink logged with timestamp and amount
• Smart statistics — daily average, best day, goal rate, and streaks
• 30-day calendar — visualize consistency with a color-coded heat map

▸ STREAKS & ACHIEVEMENTS

Build daily streaks and unlock 12 achievements across four categories: Streak, Volume, Variety, and Consistency. From "Hydration Starter" (3 days) to "Century Club" (100 days).

▸ SMART REMINDERS

Context-aware notifications during waking hours. Quiet at night. Streak-at-risk alerts keep you on track. Goal celebration when you hit your target.

▸ SHARE YOUR STATS

Generate beautiful hydration cards with your progress ring, stats, and streak — perfect for Instagram, TikTok, or friends who need a hydration nudge.

▸ PRIVACY FIRST

All data stays on your device. No accounts. No cloud. No ads. Ever.

▸ SIRI & SHORTCUTS

"Hey Siri, log water" — hands-free hydration tracking.

▸ FREE TO USE

Core tracking is free, forever. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited history, advanced stats, smart reminders, all themes, CSV export, streak freeze, caffeine insights, and custom drinks.

Terms of Use: https://theknack2020-sketch.github.io/aquafaste/terms
Privacy Policy: https://theknack2020-sketch.github.io/aquafaste/privacy
promotionalText: NEW: Personal Hydration Score rates your day from 0-100. Track 12 drink types, build streaks, earn achievements. Science-based goals. No ads, ever.
whatsNew:
AquaFaste 2.0 — completely redesigned:

• Personal Hydration Score — rate your day from 0 to 100
• Beautiful iPad Experience — optimized layouts for every screen size
• Smarter Typography — scales perfectly across all devices
• Refined Animations — smoother springs, delightful micro-interactions
• Dark Mode Polish — deeper contrast, better readability at night
• Accessibility — full VoiceOver support and Dynamic Type throughout
• Performance — faster launch, smoother scrolling

Thank you for staying hydrated with AquaFaste!
